title: SSB Constable Vacancy 2026, Check Eligibility & Apply Now -
short_info: SSB Constable Vacancy 2026: Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) are Applications are invited from serving (Male & Female) Combatized CTs (Tradesmen i.e. Tailor, Cobbler, Cook, Barber, Washerman, Safaiwala, Mali, Water Carrier, Waiter & Helper) and CT (Orderlies) of SSB for filling up 50 vacancies of Constable (General Duty) for the year 2026 through remusteration as per details given below:-

vacancy_details.eligibility: Matriculation or equivalent from a recognized board or institute.

how_to_apply: Download the Form: visit the official website https://recruitment.ssb.gov.in/ Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). Also, attach a self-addressed envelope of size 25 cm x 10 cm. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed as “Application for the post of ___________________”. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. SSB Constable Vacancy 2026
